'''Shōhei School''' (昌平学校):
* The name used when the educational institution of the {{ill|Tokugawa Shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}}, the {{ill|Shōheizaka Academy|ja|昌平坂学問所}}, was reorganized into a government-run school under the new Meiji government in {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}}. * The former name of the {{ill|Shōheikō Educational Corporation|ja|学校法人昌平黌}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11511949]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Shōhei School''' (昌平学校):

* The name used when the educational institution of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the {{ill|Shōheizaka Academy|ja|昌平坂学問所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheizaka Academy|qq=|1=Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4059219}}, was reorganized into a government-run school under the new Meiji government in [[:en:1868|1868]].
* The former name of the {{ill|Shōheikō Educational Corporation|ja|学校法人昌平黌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheikō Educational Corporation|qq=|1=Shōheikō Educational Corporation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11448535}}.

* The name used when the educational institution of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}, the {{ill|Shōheizaka Academy|ja|昌平坂学問所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheizaka Academy|1=Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4059219}}, was reorganized into a government-run school under the new Meiji government in [[:en:1868|1868]]. * The former name of the {{ill|Shōheikō Educational Corporation|ja|学校法人昌平黌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheikō Educational Corporation|1=Shōheikō Educational Corporation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11448535}}.

* The name used when the educational institution of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}, the {{ill|Shōheizaka Academy|ja|昌平坂学問所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheizaka Academy|1=Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4059219}}, was reorganized into a government-run school under the new Meiji government in [[:en:1868|1868]]. * The former name of the {{ill|Shōheikō Educational Corporation|ja|学校法人昌平黌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheikō Educational Corporation|1=Shōheikō Educational Corporation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11448535}}.

* The name used when the educational institution of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Tokugawa shogunate|lt=Tokugawa Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}, the {{ill|Shōheizaka Academy|ja|昌平坂学問所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheizaka Academy|1=Shoheizaka Academy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4059219}}, was reorganized into a government-run school under the new Meiji government in {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}}. * The former name of the {{ill|Shōheikō Educational Corporation|ja|学校法人昌平黌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheikō Educational Corporation|1=Q11448535|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11448535}}.
